fields.title: Cheating
fields.punishment: Up to 7 years imprisonment and fine
fields.description: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property.

fields.title: Theft
fields.punishment: Up to 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

fields.title: Cruelty by husband or relatives
fields.punishment: Up to 3 years imprisonment and fine
fields.description: Cruelty against a married woman by husband or relatives.

fields.title: Common Intention
fields.description: When a criminal act is done by several persons in furtherance of common intention.

fields.title: Criminal Conspiracy
fields.punishment: Up to 6 months to life imprisonment
fields.description: When two or more persons agree to commit an illegal act.
